name: euaiact_classify_system
description: Classify an AI system's risk level under EU AI Act Regulation 2024/1689. Returns risk category, applicable Annex III category, relevant articles, provider/deployer role determination, and recommended follow-up actions.

description.description: Free-text description of the AI system, its purpose, and how it works.

use_case.description: The intended use case or deployment context of the AI system.

domain.description: The sector or domain of deployment (e.g., healthcare, HR, law enforcement, education, finance).

biometric.description: Whether the system involves biometric identification or categorisation.

synthetic_content.description: Whether the system generates synthetic content (text, images, audio, video, code).

name: euaiact_check_deadlines
description: Returns all EU AI Act implementation milestones with days remaining from today. Includes the next upcoming milestone and Digital Omnibus simplification proposal status.

only_upcoming.description: If true, return only future milestones (not past ones). Default: false.

name: euaiact_get_obligations
description: Returns specific EU AI Act compliance obligations for a given role and risk level.

role.description: The organization's role in the AI value chain.

risk_level.description: The risk classification of the AI system.

name: euaiact_answer_question
description: Search the EU AI Act FAQ corpus for answers to general compliance questions. Returns best-match answers with relevant article references.

question.description: The compliance question to search for in the FAQ corpus.

name: euaiact_calculate_penalty
description: Calculate the maximum fine under EU AI Act Article 99 based on violation type, global annual turnover, and SME status.

violation_type.description: Category of the EU AI Act violation.

annual_turnover_eur.description: Global annual turnover of the organization in EUR.

is_sme.description: Whether the organization qualifies as an SME or startup under EU law.

name: euaiact_get_article
description: Retrieve an operational summary and stable EUR-Lex URL for a specific EU AI Act article. Supported: 3, 4, 5, 6, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 26, 27, 43, 47, 49, 50, 51, 53, 55, 72, 73, 99, 100, 113.

article_number.description: The EU AI Act article number to retrieve.

name: euaiact_check_gpai_systemic_risk
description: Determine whether a general-purpose AI (GPAI) model qualifies as systemic risk under Article 51 (threshold: ≥10^25 FLOPs or Commission designation). Returns applicable obligations under Articles 52, 53, and 55.

model_name.description: Name or identifier of the GPAI model.

training_compute_flops.description: Training compute in FLOPs (floating-point operations). Threshold for systemic risk: 10^25.

description.description: Free-text description of the model's capabilities, training approach, and intended use.

name: euaiact_assess_art6_3_exception
description: Assess whether an Annex III AI system qualifies for the Article 6(3) no-significant-risk exception, which would exempt it from high-risk obligations. Validates the four required conditions and flags blockers such as the profiling prohibition.

description.description: Description of the AI system and its deployment context.

involves_profiling.description: Whether the system involves profiling of natural persons as defined in GDPR Article 4(4).

name: euaiact_annex_iv_checklist
description: Return the complete Annex IV technical documentation requirements (9 items) for high-risk AI providers under Article 11. Optionally returns a markdown checklist format for use in compliance audits.

format.description: Output format: 'list' for plain text, 'checklist' for a markdown checkbox audit checklist. Default: 'checklist'.

system_description.description: Optional description of the AI system, used to tailor the checklist to the specific context.
